roles.core: central bot, finance, licenses, central Plisio invoices and callbacks, central APIs and D1 authority
roles.edge: web panels, reseller bots, customer miniapps, reseller Plisio invoices and callbacks, and latency-sensitive request handling
roles.processor: reports, retry queue, backups and background jobs

features: remove the previous exchange integration, menus, settings and database migrations
add Plisio invoice payment to the central bot wallet recharge flow
add independent Plisio configuration and wallet recharge to every reseller bot and reseller miniapp
verify Plisio JSON callbacks using HMAC-SHA1 and the shop Secret Key
credit wallets exactly once with duplicate callback and duplicate ledger protection
store reseller Plisio settings in a separate table to avoid the D1 reseller_bots column limit
encrypt Plisio Secret Keys and delete Telegram messages containing secrets after storage
use callback-only payment confirmation without Plisio balance or transaction polling
keep BluePal, card-to-card and internal wallet payment methods unchanged

validation.javascript_syntax: passed for core, edge and processor
validation.live_plisio_payment: not run; a real Plisio shop Secret Key was not supplied
validation.legacy_exchange_reference_scan: passed; no legacy exchange references remain
